name: GT-intertwine
source: Prior VALIDATED registry lemma lem-intertwine-spectral-idempotent (proofs/lem-intertwine-spectral-idempotent/, af: validated; status proved). CONTRACT: For elements F, Phi of unital Banach algebras with ||F^2-F|| < 1/4 and ||Phi^2-Phi|| < 1/4, and a bounded unital linear intertwiner j (j(I)=I) with Fj=jPhi, the Kitaev spectral idempotents intertwine: theta(2F-1) j = j theta(2Phi-1). (Imported as a black-box validated lemma; no refs quote needed.)
